purpose: Daily free-only live discovery additions for frontend-components skill. Entries are concrete public repositories with verified MIT license evidence and are deduplicated against registry/internet-ui-templates.json and known live-discovery files.
license_policy: Free-only. Code reuse is allowed only when the upstream license is compatible and verified. Paid, Pro, premium, gated, login-required, subscription-only, trial-only, marketplace-only, and unclear-access items are excluded.

templates.name: Shadcn Next.js Dashboard
templates.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 + Radix UI + shadcn-style primitives
templates.license_evidence: Upstream LICENSE file contains MIT License; package.json confirms Next.js 15.3.8, React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, Radix UI, next-themes, Sonner, React Hook Form, and Zod.
templates.skill_usage: Use as a compact shadcn-style dashboard reference for auth-first admin pages, Radix-based form controls, theme switching, OTP/auth UI, toast feedback, and Next.js app-shell organization.

templates.name: Shadcn CRM Dashboard
templates.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 + Radix UI + shadcn/ui + Recharts
templates.license_evidence: Upstream LICENSE file contains MIT License; package.json confirms Next.js 15.2.2, React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, TanStack Query/Table, Radix UI, Recharts, date filters, resizable panels, and Sonner.
templates.skill_usage: Use as a concrete CRM/admin reference for data-heavy dashboards with TanStack Table, React Query, chart cards, customer/task flows, resizable panels, command-friendly navigation, and operational table UX.

templates.name: Shadcn ECharts Demo
templates.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 + shadcn + Base UI + ECharts
templates.license_evidence: Upstream LICENSE file contains MIT License; package.json confirms Next.js 16.1.6, React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn, Base UI, ECharts 6, Number Flow, and Lucide.
templates.skill_usage: Use as a chart-heavy dashboard reference for shadcn + ECharts panels, animated KPI values, dashboard chart cards, monitoring visualizations, finance/traffic charts, and responsive analytics widgets.

templates.name: Syncta SaaS Kit
templates.license_evidence: Upstream LICENSE file contains MIT License; package.json confirms Next.js 14.1.0, Supabase client/SSR, Stripe, Recharts, Zod, Tailwind CSS 3, and React Email dev workflow.
templates.skill_usage: Use as a simple MIT SaaS reference for Supabase-backed app shells, Stripe checkout/subscription flows, billing screens, email workflow UI, Recharts metrics, and validation-backed forms.

templates.name: Adminex React Free
templates.license_evidence: Upstream LICENSE file contains MIT License; package.json declares MIT and confirms React 19, TypeScript, Vite 8, Tailwind CSS 4, Chart.js, React Router, Swiper, and Iconify.
templates.skill_usage: Use as a free React/Vite/Tailwind admin dashboard reference for fast single-page admin shells, Chart.js widgets, icon-rich navigation, responsive cards, and lightweight internal dashboards.
